S.FORM: Jim Bostic sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1953 , ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 1, Jim Bostic, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
